name: Infernum VR
short_description: Dive into the heart of darkness with InfernumVR! Explore the nine terrifying circles of Hell in this intense survival horror game. Face demonic entities and uncover the stories of the damned. Will you escape, or become another lost soul?
detailed_description:
Infernum VR is a survival horror game based on Dante's Hell to haunt your gaming sessions in ways you never seen! Our team created whole new mechanics to take the most advantage out of virtual reality, we aim to make your experience as realistic as it can be.

You will be the main character of a trip down to satan's lair, where you will have to go through the 9 levels of hell to reach him. Each level will be harder than the last one and we aim to make it such a unique experience that only the best can reach the last levels.

On your way down you will face hundreds of enemies that have different and out-of-the-box ways to keep you there forever, in hell. To help you, you will have two pistols, one sword, and nothing else.

Good luck getting there.
